creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Enlightenment stops to respond when working with some process and dies on signal 11 when process is killed.

My machine has Nvidia card with up-to-date drivers. The whole problem only happens with mail/thunderbird when windows/notifications pops up or gets closed. The screen stops.

If I kill thunderbird enlightenment drops core. bt full shows:

#0  0x00000008038780b6 in ecore_timer_del () from /usr/local/lib/libecore.so.8
[New Thread 809c07400 (LWP 100698/enlightenment)]
(gdb) bt full
#0  0x00000008038780b6 in ecore_timer_del () from /usr/local/lib/libecore.so.8
No symbol table info available.
#1  0x00000000004966e0 in e_focus_event_mouse_in ()
No symbol table info available.
#2  0x0000000000456874 in e_border_focus_track_thaw ()
No symbol table info available.
#3  0x0000000803878ab4 in _ecore_timer_expired_call () from /usr/local/lib/libecore.so.8
No symbol table info available.
#4  0x00000008038757d3 in _ecore_main_loop_iterate_internal () from /usr/local/lib/libecore.so.8
No symbol table info available.
#5  0x0000000803875b47 in ecore_main_loop_begin () from /usr/local/lib/libecore.so.8
No symbol table info available.
#6  0x0000000000439ee8 in main ()
No symbol table info available.

I'm trying to post it here to summarize the issue.
